ham: Hey bro! Kaise ho? Aaj kal bahut kaam mein fess ho. Tumhara weekend ka plan kya hai? Call karte hain ek chai pe. :)
spam: Hey! Dhyan rahe, aaj raat ko electricity bill ka disconnection ho sakta hai. Agar payment nahi kiya, toh power cut ho jayega. Kripya <URL> ya 991xxxxxxx call kare. Urgent!!
